layers.summary: Historical bounded frontier target remains strong and bounded, but historical only.
Child campaign F01-F09 passed with bounded current-head trust, verifier, release, product wedge, and company diligence outputs.
Runtime truth exists but is uneven. No full civilization run is proven. Adapter layer remains stubbed and openclaw remains doctrinal-only.
A bounded noncommercial evaluation wedge is active. Commercial and enterprise-wide truth remain bounded downward.

recurring_success_patterns: bounded upgrades without laundering adjacent truths
child-only supersession instead of parent mutation
anti-theater retention instead of fake promotion
recurring_failure_patterns: tooling and runtime blur together through compatibility leakage
repo-root and package-root parity remains unresolved
adapter civilization rhetoric outruns adapter registry reality
